boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant or change the requested access, role, permission, or privileged action? Focus: break-glass exception matches incident and expiration.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source records do not close boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing incident ID and expiration timestamp remains unresolved.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: No exact match for incident and expiration before execution.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The source control record does not close the exact break-glass boundary because the incident ID and expiration timestamp are missing or mismatched. Per policy, communication cues cannot override source-control records. Escalate for an exact source match before any access change.
